item.dc:creator: avianidiot

item.title: Each one he does fits so well lol
item.dc:creator: okaiiru

item.title: So I've seen this post making its way around the internet.
item.description: At first you might be thinking he's an idiot searching for a leak when there is no air pressure to leak out but what he is doing is something pretty standard practice. After applying a patch to a tire you will spray it once it is mounted to see if there is a leak where you patched. Sometimes when your patch appears to have been unsuccessful and leaking air it actually ends up being just air caught inside the patch when you applied it. You can take the tire off the rim and you will see it continue to bubble with no pressure to leak through. Once you confirm it is just trapped air that you are seeing you can then have greater confidence in sending the customer on their way, knowing that the tire isn't just going to go flat on them. I hate seeing things like this, just a guy trying to do his job, someone taking a photo of them making an assumption and the internet just does their thing. Just had to vent.
item.dc:creator: creamygreek

item.title: Vintage meme dump v1
item.description:
They’re from about a year ago, maybe longer? Idk
I have a baby now so I need phone space for other stuff
I went through and cropped all of these, I hate cropping so much but hopefully it was worth it?
ADHD babeyyyyy
Idk about the Christian perspective thing but I had a plug-in that replaced Trump with Drunmpf and it was awesome
Do I get secret powers or is this a hunger games situation
I want one. Need to see if I can find a print model.
Ok this was an accident but it’s still hilarious, it’s a review of From Blood and Ash I think
Reality sucks. The worldbuilding is crap. You expect me to believe that there’s as much lore about dragons and aliens and vampires and they don’t fucking exist? Red herrings in a fantasy? Get out.
Gen Z has a way with memes
10000x better than the original if you ask me, the original wastes too much time telling me who everyone’s father is
It really is, Azula is easily the scariest fighter in the world
I spent like ten minutes trying to help my host mom in Italy understand that I was going to London bc she knew it as Londra and then I got to London and they were like “what’s Firenze what’s Venezia” get your shit together world
It’s ridiculous how good cookies and lemonade go together. You’d think milk, and milk is great, but lemonade is a whole other level.
I’m going to die one day trying to pet a polar bear, you think I’m gonna run away from dragons??????
It’s weird how long they call him Jianyu in the Good Place. Like his name is Jason. He told you that 14 episodes ago. C’mon.
I too did not ask for skin and washing it off is such a chore
Idk which one I am but it’s probably the most offensive one, last one of these I saw was all different forms of potato and mine was fucking raw. Literally the only bad kind of potato.
I’m cooking up a modern au with necromancers and vampires and stuff and this would totally be in it. They just chill about and be gay academics.
Kale is amazing for pets. My lizard eats it. It grows like crazy, she can’t eat it fast enough.
Look deeper. Dive on in. Let the trash take you. You’re mine now.
My dad gave me a purple lightsaber once and I can’t help but think this is why
Does someone else make the drink? If so Mai Tai and my homemade psychological theory blending the social freezing theory with extremism. If not, champagne.
I want to adopt all of the children, not just two. It’s rude is what it is. And I wanna marry Serana. And maybe one other guy. Throuple.
Aztec history is so baller you guys it’s so cool I can’t even tell you
I hope the pixels come back
Crabs are too stupid to be evil but they definitely try
Fruit bats know how to party. Also they’re freakin adorable. Also, tons of rabies
Me. Currently posting this at 8:15pm and I’m going to bed once it’s done.
This is what you wear when the police come by to tell you that your rich husband has died under mysterious circumstances
I went back and read the Iliad and ya they’re gay. So. So gay.
I don’t think I have Norse ancestry but this is hilarious
Always let a mango. We ain’t in a shortage, you’ll find more.
Weighted blankets are amazing
It’s very true. I have trouble believing in humanity in general bc the evidence doesn’t stack up well.
Sounds fantastic I’m down
Mr Business tax. I miss him.
Weasel tax
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: The best of humanity in the worst of times
item.dc:creator: Mech0T1
